outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated intraday volatility expected due to negative 0DTE GEX, but weekly/monthly positive GEX provides stability. Spot pinned near gamma flip creates directional uncertainty.
outlook.summary: Market at critical inflection point. Spot (663.75) hovering directly above weekly gamma flip (663.5). Extremely high Put/Call ratios (1.60-5.15) indicate excessive bearish positioning, creating potential for short squeeze. Reverse smirk skew confirms bullish undercurrent. Max Pain convergence at 675-683 suggests upside magnet. Dealers long gamma on weekly/monthly expiries will suppress large moves, but 0DTE negative GEX may cause intraday noise. Watch 660 support and 680 resistance for directional breakout.

levels.motivazione: Weekly gamma equilibrium point. Spot at 663.75 is within 0.25 points - critical inflection. Break above confirms bullish control, break below triggers dealer hedging cascade. High probability pivot zone.
RESONANCE across all 5 expiries. Massive 127,150 OI in MONTHLY_1. Primary structural support. Dealer delta hedging creates strong buying pressure at this level. Distance 0.56% from spot.
RESONANCE across 5 expiries with dominant Call OI. Confluence with WEEKLY_1 Max Pain (680.0). Dealer resistance zone. High volume activity confirms significance.
RESONANCE level with 112,996 OI in MONTHLY_1. Deep structural floor. High PCR (2.42) in MONTHLY_1 indicates heavy put positioning - potential gamma squeeze if broken.
0DTE Max Pain level. Price magnet active for today's expiry. Confluence with high 0DTE CALL OI (13,045) and PUT interest in weekly/monthly. Natural attraction point.
CONFLUENCE between WEEKLY_1 (31,856 OI) and MONTHLY_1 (44,054 OI). Secondary support zone. Volume/OI ratio indicates active positioning.
RESONANCE across 4+ expiries. Strongest CALL OI in MONTHLY_1 (41,151). Upper resistance boundary. Break above targets 690 area.

outlook.summary: Market in acute short-gamma regime. All expiries negative GEX with elevated PCR (1.45-3.01). Weekly skew bearish (1.48-1.64). Dealers will accelerate moves. Strong support cluster 6600-6620, major resistance 6900 RESONANCE.

Multi-expiry support: 0DTE (7849), WEEKLY_1 (5918), MONTHLY_2 (2467). Secondary structural support.
Deep support across 4 expiries: 0DTE (5979), WEEKLY_1 (7011), WEEKLY_2 (1824), MONTHLY_2 (16106). Crash protection.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected due to negative aggregate GEX (-0.40B net). Dealers short gamma will amplify price movements. Spot trading between key support/resistance clusters increases directional uncertainty.
outlook.summary: Spot at 24367 sits above critical put resonance at 24000-24100 but faces multiple call barriers at 24700-25200. Negative total GEX across most expiries suggests dealers are short gamma, creating unstable conditions. Bearish skew persists in WEEKLY and MONTHLY tenors. Max Pain cluster (24700-25500) above spot indicates potential upward magnetic pull, but heavy call walls may cap rallies. Watch for volatility expansion on any breach of 24000 support.

levels.motivazione: MONTHLY_1 dominant call concentration with 4031 OI. Largest single-strike call position across all expiries. Primary upside cap for institutional hedging flows.
Multi-expiry resonance across 5 tenors (0DTE+WEEKLY_1+WEEKLY_2+MONTHLY_1+MONTHLY_2). Cumulative OI 579 calls. Also WEEKLY_2 Max Pain alignment.
WEEKLY_1 dominant call wall (584 OI) + MONTHLY_1 call interest (219 OI). Confluence with WEEKLY_1 Max Pain. Primary resistance magnet zone.

0DTE Max Pain level 2.03% above spot. Near-term dealer target for premium decay. Magnet effect active in current session.
Four-expiry put resonance (0DTE+WEEKLY_2+MONTHLY_1+MONTHLY_2) with 1108 cumulative OI. Deep structural support below spot.
0DTE gamma neutral point. Below this level dealers flip to long gamma. Far below spot but marks structural risk boundary in tail scenarios.
